items.title: S01E01 - Max
items.summary: Max Keller meets up with John Peter McAllister, an American who having remained in Japan after World War II, became the only occidental American ever to achieve the status of the Ninja. Having returned to America to locate his newly discovered daughter, he agrees to tutor Max in the ninjutsu arts, while helping a father and daughter fend off an unscrupulous land developer who is trying to get a hold of their airport.

infolabels.title: Max
infolabels.plot: Max Keller meets up with John Peter McAllister, an American who having remained in Japan after World War II, became the only occidental American ever to achieve the status of the Ninja. Having returned to America to locate his newly discovered daughter, he agrees to tutor Max in the ninjutsu arts, while helping a father and daughter fend off an unscrupulous land developer who is trying to get a hold of their airport.

items.title: S01E02 - Out-of-Time Step
items.summary: On the trail of his daughter in San Francisco, McCallister and Max aid a nightclub owner against a ruthless Chinese syndicate.

infolabels.title: Out-of-Time Step
infolabels.plot: On the trail of his daughter in San Francisco, McCallister and Max aid a nightclub owner against a ruthless Chinese syndicate.

items.title: S01E03 - State of the Union
items.summary: After arriving in a coastal down, Max and the Master help a young girl, Kerry, set up a union in the local cannery despite the wishes of the owner.

infolabels.title: State of the Union
infolabels.plot: After arriving in a coastal down, Max and the Master help a young girl, Kerry, set up a union in the local cannery despite the wishes of the owner.

items.title: S01E04 - Hostages
items.summary: Max and McCallister get invited to an exclusive political party at an isolated mansion that is taken over by terrorists. The local CIA head is aware of McCallister's past and suspects him of being involved - McCallister must free the hostages to prove his innocence. And Okasa is lurking nearby to complicate matters even further...

infolabels.title: Hostages
infolabels.plot: Max and McCallister get invited to an exclusive political party at an isolated mansion that is taken over by terrorists. The local CIA head is aware of McCallister's past and suspects him of being involved - McCallister must free the hostages to prove his innocence. And Okasa is lurking nearby to complicate matters even further...

items.title: S01E05 - High Rollers
items.summary: A former military squad turns to crime and plans a casino heist, and needs the inside help of a dancer - they kidnap her daughter to get it.

infolabels.title: High Rollers
infolabels.plot: A former military squad turns to crime and plans a casino heist, and needs the inside help of a dancer - they kidnap her daughter to get it.

items.title: S01E06 - Fat Tuesday
items.summary: McCallister and Max come to the aid of a reporter doing an expose on ruthless gunrunners.

infolabels.title: Fat Tuesday
infolabels.plot: McCallister and Max come to the aid of a reporter doing an expose on ruthless gunrunners.

items.title: S01E07 - Juggernaut
items.summary: Farmers need the help of the Master and pupil to get their goods to market past a trucking firm's roadblock.

infolabels.title: Juggernaut
infolabels.plot: Farmers need the help of the Master and pupil to get their goods to market past a trucking firm's roadblock.

items.title: S01E08 - The Good, the Bad and the Priceless
items.summary: To rescue a woman claiming to be the Master's daughter, Max and the Master end up having to steal the British Crown Jewels.

infolabels.title: The Good, the Bad and the Priceless
infolabels.plot: To rescue a woman claiming to be the Master's daughter, Max and the Master end up having to steal the British Crown Jewels.

items.title: S01E09 - Kunoichi
items.summary: McCallister is framed for murder by an old ""friend.""

infolabels.title: Kunoichi
infolabels.plot: McCallister is framed for murder by an old ""friend.""

items.title: S01E10 - The Java Tiger
items.summary: The Master must make his way past a booby-trapped cave in Hawaii to recover a priceless statue.

infolabels.title: The Java Tiger
infolabels.plot: The Master must make his way past a booby-trapped cave in Hawaii to recover a priceless statue.

items.title: S01E11 - Failure To Communicate
items.summary: When a secretary is kidnapped, Max and the Master get involved. The secretary works for Max's negligent, drunk father, and they must protect a blind woman who the kidnappers believe is a witness to their crime.

infolabels.title: Failure To Communicate
infolabels.plot: When a secretary is kidnapped, Max and the Master get involved. The secretary works for Max's negligent, drunk father, and they must protect a blind woman who the kidnappers believe is a witness to their crime.

items.title: S01E12 - Rogues
items.summary: The Master takes on a squad of rogue cops using their training and positions to commit a series of robberies.

infolabels.title: Rogues
infolabels.plot: The Master takes on a squad of rogue cops using their training and positions to commit a series of robberies.

items.title: S01E13 - A Place to Call Home
items.summary: The Master and Max take on a ruthless land developer who is trying to evict a woman and the orphans she takes care of from their property.

infolabels.title: A Place to Call Home
infolabels.plot: The Master and Max take on a ruthless land developer who is trying to evict a woman and the orphans she takes care of from their property.
